stemHtml: When there is a high density of traffic, how can TCAS limit the number of monitored targets?

options.a: The pilot can set TCAS to “BLW” to inhibit inputs from aircraft flying higher than the current altitude.
options.b: TCAS can automatically reduce detection range to focus on the closest threats.
options.c: The pilot can set TCAS to “ABV” to inhibit inputs from aircraft flying lower than the current altitude.
options.d: Can automatically detect 30 aircraft within 10 NM, refusing other aircraft outside this range.
